# Sjoh

> South Africa's no-commission directory of vetted service providers. Find someone who can do it properly — plumbers, electricians, designers, tutors and more, across all 9 provinces.

Sjoh connects South African customers directly with verified local pros. Customers post jobs free; pros pay a flat monthly subscription with 0% commission. Direct contact, no middleman, no bidding wars.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Sjoh is and how it works.
- [Directory](/directory): Browse vetted South African service providers by category and province.
- [Post a job](/requests): Customers post a job and receive direct quotes.
- [Leads](/leads): Pros browse open jobs and quote directly.
- [Pricing](/pricing): R250/month Verified Pro, 30-day free trial, 0% commission, FAQ.
- [List your business](/list): How pros sign up and get verified.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): POPIA-compliant privacy policy.

## Optional

- [Login](/login)
- [Register](/register)
